title: GAP-C: Update URI examples in .rs doc comments
description: Why: Doc comments in backend lib.rs files show the old URI format. These render in rustdoc and set expectations for callers.\n\nWhat: Update inline doc-comment URI strings (/// lines) in all backend crate src/lib.rs files. Also update secretx-core/src/lib.rs and secretx/src/lib.rs top-level module docs. Note: some of these overlap with GAP-B (doc-tests); coordinate to avoid double-touching.
